task_completion.description: Access OrientDB Studio in the web browser
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrientDB Studio login page or main interface is visible in the web browser at localhost:2480.
The OrientDB Studio interface shows 'demodb' as the active connected database (usually visible in the top navigation bar or database selection menu).

task_completion.description: Locate the source profile with email 'domi@nek.gov'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A query (e.g., SELECT FROM Profiles WHERE Email = 'domi@nek.gov') or graph search is executed, and the record for Isaac Black (domi@nek.gov) is displayed in the results.

task_completion.description: Locate the target profile with email 'seari@ubu.edu'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A query or graph search is executed, and the record for Rosie Thornton (seari@ubu.edu) is displayed in the results.

task_completion.description: Create a 'HasFriend' edge from the source profile to the target profile
task_completion.visual_evidence: A successful 'CREATE EDGE HasFriend FROM ... TO ...' query execution message in the Browse tab, OR a visual edge labeled 'HasFriend' connecting the two profile nodes in the Graph tab, OR the record view showing the new edge connection.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with OrientDB Studio
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OrientDB Studio GUI inside a web browser, rather than a text editor or script.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show curl commands or OrientDB console commands executing the edge creation directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The database name is 'demodb'. The source profile belongs to Isaac Black (Email: domi@nek.gov). The target profile belongs to Rosie Thornton (Email: seari@ubu.edu). The edge class to be created is 'HasFriend'. The edge must be directed FROM domi@nek.gov TO seari@ubu.edu.
